HGSS.683.0001:
We should trade phone numbers, so I
can educate you more on the\r
merits of Bug-type Pokémon![0200,0000]
HGSS.683.0002:
You betcha. Thanks!
I’ll call you sometime!
HGSS.683.0004:
Oh, did you decide to exchange
phone numbers after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.683.0005:
Oh, there you are!\f
I thought I’d give you a Berry, so I’ve
been waiting here for you!\f
Here you go!\f
HGSS.683.0006:
Wait, what?\f
If you’re nearby, don’t bother with the
phone. Come talk in person!
HGSS.683.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] is growing up well,
if I do say so myself!\f
Why, in a recent battle against
[0100,000B,0000], it knocked it out before\r
I could blink!\f
Before I could even blink! Amazing, eh?
HGSS.683.0008:
Argh, I give up! My [0100,000A,0000] has
gotten pretty strong, you know.\f
I figured that it should be able to
easily knock out a [0100,000B,0000]...\f
But once we got a good look at it, we
saw it was really high level...\r
We got beaten up, down, and sideways...
HGSS.683.0009:
You know, earlier by the roadside, this
[0100,000B,0000] jumped out at me!\f
I really love Pokémon, but...bam!
It sure startled me!\f
I mean, if you’re going to jump out at a
person, you should at least have the\r
decency to introduce yourself first!
HGSS.683.0010:
You know, I’d really like to sit down and
talk with you about the virtues of\r
Bug-type Pokémon!\f
What do you think? I’m on
[0104,0003,0000]. How about you come\r
over for a battle?
HGSS.683.0011:
Let’s have a battle. We haven’t had one
in a while! I’m on [0104,0003,0000]...\r
Don’t forget!
HGSS.683.0012:
You know, my dad was a researcher
studying Bug-type Pokémon.\f
Ever since I was young, there’s
always been Bug-type Pokémon\r
scattered all over the house.\f
That’s why I started to like Bug-type
Pokémon so much myself.\f
My mom...
Well, she screamed a lot.
HGSS.683.0013:
I found some Berries. I’ve already got
more than I need, so I’ll give you some!\f
I’m on [0104,0003,0000]. Come pick
them up!
HGSS.683.0014:
You want Berries, don’t you?\f
I’ll give you some if you come visit me
on [0104,0003,0000]!
